nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_detail: Mostly cloudy. High near 67, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. South wind 14 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph.

miami.label: Miami
miami.today_detail: Scattered showers and thunderstorms after 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 90. Southwest wind 1 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
miami.tonight_forecast: Isolated Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
